title: navia angustifolia
intro: Navia angustifolia, also known as the "Mexican Hat Plant", is a species of epiphytic bromeliad native to Mexico and Central America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Navia angustifolia include alleviating symptoms of bronchitis, asthma, and other respiratory conditions, as well as providing antioxidant and antimicrobial effects. Herbal preparations of Navia angustifolia can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, or by using the plant's essential oil in aromatherapy.
